svg.aria-label: 5F10 · eyelet board layout — redrawn board layout diagram
svg.text: Redrawn from Fender 'Harvard' Model 5F10 drawing (F-EF), page 1 of 2 (layout; page 2 is the schematic reproduced in this amp's schematic.kicad_sch) — not a trace
Note: the 6.3 V heater twisted pair always routes on the top layer and never joins another run — its crossings are not hop-overs.
